changesProposed.name: Engine Ventures

verified.name: Engine Ventures
verified.thesis: Engine Ventures invests in early-stage deep tech companies developing hardware-based technologies across fields including biotech, robotics, green energy, agriculture, manufacturing, material science, and quantum computing.
verified.notes: Engine Ventures spun out as a separate investment firm from The Engine nonprofit incubator in 2023. Sources [0] and [1] are primarily about The Engine nonprofit (founded 2016), not Engine Ventures. The sector focus list is extracted from The Engine's resident company filter categories at source [1], which reflects the broader ecosystem. No current senior partners for Engine Ventures are explicitly named in sources. AUM and flagship fund information are not verifiable from provided sources.

changes.current: Engine Ventures invests in early-stage deep tech companies developing hardware-based technologies across fields including biotech, robotics, green energy, agriculture, manufacturing, material science, and quantum computing. In 2023, the investment fund separated from The Engine nonprofit incubator and rebranded as a venture capital firm.
